addon:addon.name: ESPHome Binding
addon:addon.description: This is the binding for ESPHome native protocol.

parameter.name: defaultEncryptionKey
parameter.label: Default Base64 encoded encryption key for encrypted connection
parameter.description: Specified in the api: -> encryption: -> key: section of the esphome device config. See https://esphome.io/components/api#configuration-variables. Will be used as default if not configured on the device thing.

parameter.name: esphomeExecutable
parameter.label: Fully qualified path for 'esphome' binary
parameter.description: Used for firmware upgrades. Make sure you have given OH the necessary permissions to execute this command.

parameter.name: esphomeUpgradeExecutable
parameter.label: Fully qualified path to the command you use to upgrade esphome.
parameter.description: This depends on your package manager. If using homebrew, the correct command would be 'brew upgrade esphome'. Make sure you have given OH the necessary permissions to execute this command.
